suggestions.topic: PTC committee caching decision for ePBS
suggestions.rationale: ACDT #73 identified a critical attestation validity issue where PTCs valid in epoch N become invalid in N+1. Decision needed this week before testing attestations on ePBS DevNet-0. 256KB cache proposal requires consensus.

suggestions.topic: BAL DevNet-3 launch readiness and EIP-8037 consensus bugs
suggestions.rationale: DevNet-3 launch targeted March 11 but blocked on cross-client EIP-8037 consensus issues. ACDT #73 revealed deep implementation complexity affecting multiple clients (Besu 7 failing tests, Nethermind/Reth expressing concerns). Status check critical before launch decision.

suggestions.topic: ePBS DevNet-0 status: reorg handling and attestation testing
suggestions.rationale: DevNet-0 launched March 4 but encountering fundamental issues: EL must support building on older heads (spec update needed), payload attestations being ignored, and PTC lookahead problems. Need coordinated testing of withdrawals/deposits/blobs before live testing.

suggestions.topic: SSZ Engine API transport proposal for ACD approval
suggestions.rationale: ACDT #73 deferred SSZ Engine API decision to ACD. Proof-of-concept implemented across 6 clients (Prism/Lodestar/Lighthouse/Teku/Aragon/Nethermind/Geth) addresses serialization bottleneck. Ready for governance decision on optional deployment via content-type headers.

suggestions.topic: Gas repricing benchmarking timeline and final numbers
suggestions.rationale: Deferred decision from ACDT #69 expected 'end of March' for final repricing numbers. ACDT #71 revealed benchmark loop exceeds 1 day per data point with test definition issues delaying EIP-8038. Update needed on whether March deadline remains feasible.

suggestions.topic: Perf-devnet-3 sync issues and 5 Gigagas testing results
suggestions.rationale: ACDT #73 reported Geth synced successfully but Reth/Nethermind/Besu experiencing sync issues on 1.5-2TB state. 5 Gigagas testing revealing OOM issues. State bloat testing approaching 4TB target — need status on client optimizations and whether worst-case scenarios identified new bottlenecks.

suggestions.topic: ETH/70 and ETH/71 deployment status across clients
suggestions.rationale: ACDT #72 showed Besu and Reth ready for nft-devnet-10 (ETH/70). ETH/71 scoped as optional for DevNet-3 with 2MB soft cap clarification in ACDT #73. Status check on remaining clients and whether ETH/71 will be tested on DevNet-3.

suggestions.topic: Fusaka testnet deployment strategy (Holesky/Sepolia vs DevNet)
suggestions.rationale: ACDT #72 decided to skip expensive Blob DevNet and test directly on Holesky/Sepolia. CL teams targeting hidden flags release for testing. Update on testnet readiness and timeline for PeerDAS activation on public testnets.
